/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-g++ -g  -fuse-ld=mold CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/db_helper.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/email_report.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/hal/hal_dht11.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/hal/hal_echo.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/hal/hal_gpio.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/hal/hal_oled.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/hal/hal_system.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/menu.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/mqtt_client.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/network_monitor.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/pages/page_advanced_analysis.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/pages/page_dashboard.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/pages/page_docker.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/pages/page_env.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/pages/page_interface.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/pages/page_network.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/pages/page_screensaver.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/pages/page_system.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/pages/page_terminal.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/pages/page_tools.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/system_monitor.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/c/thread.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/cpp/advanced_analysis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/expansion_ui.dir/src/cpp/hello.cpp.o -o expansion_ui  -lmosquitto -lpthread -lgpiod /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so -lcjson -lmysqlclient -lxlsxwriter -lm
